metadata.title: Sneaking Into B Site for a Quick Double on VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a sharp B site play where timing and stealth win the round. Catch how sneaky movement and clean shots make all the difference.
What’s your favorite angle to surprise enemies on B?

Drop your clutch moments below!

Tell me your best sneaky plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
